generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor for point cloud and object detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HokuyoLidarPointCloud
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for depth data and object detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IntelDepthCameraData
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor for measuring ego vehicle speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedData
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor for measuring steering angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleData
]

instance HokuyoLidarPointCloud : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance IntelDepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoLidarPointCloud
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Python3.8
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth data from Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IntelDepthCameraData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Python3.8
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ego vehicle speed data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Python3.8
]

instance SteeringAngleDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ego vehicle steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Python3.8
]

instance DetectedObjectsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured object tracks from Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoLidarPointCloud, IntelDepthCameraData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Python3.8
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking using DBSCAN followed by Kalman filter for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Python3.8, CPlusPlus
]

instance ACCModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) for speed computation based on lead vehicle detection"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Python3.8, CPlusPlus
]

instance ROS2 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 for middleware communication between system components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack5.0 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration of computation-intensive tasks"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance Python3.8 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for data processing and control logic implementation"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for low-latency data processing and control logic"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data Monitoring via UI displaying real-time vehicle state data, projected driving paths, and detected object tracks, enabling data viewing, saving, and report generation"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVehicleStateInsight, ProjectedDrivingPathInsight, DetectedObjectTracksInsight, SaveDataAction, GenerateReportAction
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloading ACC system (lead vehicle detection, speed calculation based on distance) from on-board ECUs to cloud-based resources, with results sent back for actuation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCComputationResultInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote Management allowing operators to enable/disable ACC, set desired speeds, and issue emergency braking commands remotely"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance RealTimeVehicleStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time display of vehicle speed and steering angle data"
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPathInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of projected driving path based on ACC computations"
]

instance DetectedObjectTracksInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of detected object tracks from clustering and tracking"
]

instance SaveDataAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to save current sensor and vehicle state data to SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance GenerateReportAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to generate operational reports from stored data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ACCComputationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Computed speed and lead vehicle distance for ACC system"
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote command to enable Adaptive Cruise Control system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote command to disable Adaptive Cruise Control system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote command to set desired speed for ACC"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote emergency braking command for immediate vehicle stop"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DataCollectingFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Functional Entity responsible for collecting sensor inputs and ego vehicle state data"
]

instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Functional Entity for serializing data streams, aligning message types, and performing unit conversions"
]

instance ActuationFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Functional Entity converting desired speed into motor voltage commands for ACC response"
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Interface subcomponent for 3D visualization of vehicle state and object tracks"
]

instance ControlPanelFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Interface subcomponent for control inputs and parameter settings"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin representing the 1/10-scale teleoperated autonomous vehicle with chassis layers and autonomy elements"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity representing the Observable Manufacturing Element (OME)"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Entity providing interfaces for monitoring and control"
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for motor control"
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering Servo for steering adjustment"
]

instance ADASDigitalTwinSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity, HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, VedderElectronicSpeedController, SteeringServo, DataCollectingFE, DataTranslationFE, ActuationFE, ThreeDVisualizationFE, ControlPanelFE
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands from the ACC Controlling FE and Control Panel User Interface FE are serialized by the Data Translation component and transmitted over Wi-Fi using UDP to the Actuation FE for motor and steering servo actuation."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system requires 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for coordination between devices to enable computation offloading in safety-critical vehicular applications, constrained by hardware limitations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The architecture follows ISO 23247 Reference Architecture (RA) with modifications, mapping software components to Functional Entities (FEs) implemented as ROS2 packages. The system is structured into three entities: Physical Twin Entity (hosting resource-specific and general automotive functionality), Digital Twin Entity (data management and control), and User Entity (3D Visualization and Control Panel). Each entity is deployed on separate hardware, with the Physical Twin Entity representing a significant deviation from the standard's OME."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity requirements emphasize real-time and high-fidelity computational reflections as stated in the Introduction. Validation includes Requirement R7 enforcing network latency of at most 100 ms and Requirement R8 ensuring clock synchronization accuracy within 100 ms. These constraints ensure system responsiveness and temporal consistency for accurate Digital Twin operations."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Internal communication between software components uses ROS2, while inter-entity communication occurs over Wi-Fi with UDP transport. The system adheres to Requirement R7, maintaining network latency of at most 100 ms. The architecture employs a distributed network topology with ROS2 for intra-entity and Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication, ensuring reliable data exchange within specified latency constraints."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Each entity (Physical Twin, Digital Twin, User Entity) is deployed on dedicated hardware components. Specific hardware includes NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano for edge processing of sensor data. Compute resources are allocated to cloud or edge based on suitability, as per Section III.A. The deployment model supports both edge and cloud environments, with NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano handling real-time tasks and cloud resources providing scalability for data storage and processing."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247:2021 standard, which includes four parts: Part 1 (Overview and general principles), Part 2 (Reference architecture), Part 3 (Digital representation of physical manufacturing elements), and Part 4 (Information exchange). Part 2 defines an entity-based reference architecture comprising Observable Manufacturing Elements (OMEs) as physical entities (e.g., equipment, facilities, products), Data Collection and Device Control Entity for data collection and control, Digital Twin Entity for digital representation, and User Entity for user interaction interfaces. Each entity is composed of Functional Entities (FEs) handling tasks such as actuation, data transformation, and user interfacing."
]
